description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a rectangular footprint, featuring a flat, tiled roof and a symmetrical facade. The front of the house is defined by a covered porch supported by columns, with two palm trees and a paved driveway leading up to it. Large windows are arranged in even rows on both floors, providing ample natural light and a contemporary appearance. On one side of the house, there is a backyard area with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and an umbrella, suggesting a focus on outdoor leisure. The property is landscaped with several trees and includes a parking area with a car visible. The overall design is clean and functional, with a focus on open space and modern amenities.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, a covered front porch, and a backyard pool area. The property features palm trees, a paved driveway, and contemporary landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch with columns, two palm trees, driveway, and part of the pool area to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, parked car, and symmetrical window arrangement; pool area is not visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, umbrella, and more trees; the back facade mirrors the front's symmetry.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool area, umbrella, and additional landscaping; driveway and palm trees are visible in the background.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, wide steps, and a central door flanked by large windows
